_comment: Allow-list of itch.io pack titles to download via scripts/fetch-itch.mjs. Mirrors the relevant subset of voxel-realms/scripts/fetch-itch-audio.mjs ALLOW_LIST plus the Chaos-Slice voxel packs needed for Grovekeeper biomes. Audio packs cover music, UI, footsteps, inventory, impact, whoosh, magic; voxel packs cover characters, peaceful/hostile creatures, props, flora.
audio: Retro PSX Footstep SFX Pack (40 Lo-Fi Foley Sounds)

Cinematic Whoosh SFX Pack – 42 Fast Transition Sounds
Fantasy Magic Spell Sound Effects Pack
Lo-Fi Chill Game Music Pack – 10 Relaxed Loops
